content:
1. Fetches articles for a given month, optionally filters by category in Python, then builds a Report of ArticleSummaries (each doing a per-article author lookup). Exists for a demo; noted as having scaled poorly due to classic N+1.

2. The loop calling db.get_author on every article; category filter runs after fetch; Dec year rollover date math; mutation of the returned Report object; any DB exceptions.

3. Batch-fetching authors and pushing the category filter into SQL (both flagged in the header comments).

4. Missing authors, bad/missing article fields, DB connection or query failures, empty input, very large result sets, timezone or datetime edge cases.
